relabel.sg-environmental-health-health-promotion: cardiovascular disease prevention and health promotion

notes.sg-environmental-health-global-health: This is a broad topic, but relevant to environmental health in cardiology.
notes.sg-environmental-health-disease-burden: Merged into 'burden of disease' as it's a near duplicate.
notes.sg-environmental-health-burden-of-diseas: This is a core concept for environmental health.
notes.sg-environmental-health-years-of-potenti: This is a specific metric for disease burden.
notes.sg-environmental-health-migraine-and-hea: Merged into 'disability-adjusted life year' as it appears to be a specific example of a broader metric.
notes.sg-environmental-health-indirect-costs: This is a relevant economic aspect of environmental health impacts.
notes.sg-environmental-health-medical-costs: Merged into 'indirect costs' as they are closely related economic measures.
notes.sg-environmental-health-cancer-incidence: This is a specific disease incidence that can be influenced by environmental factors.
notes.sg-environmental-health-disability-adjus: This is a key metric for quantifying disease burden.
